examples.text: يَعْمَلُونَ لَهُۥ مَا يَشَاءُ مِنْ مَحَٰرِيبَ وَتَمَٰثِيلَ وَجِفَانٍ كَٱلْجَوَابِ وَقُدُورٍ رَاسِيَٰتٍ ٱعْمَلُوا ءَالَ دَاوُۥدَ شُكْرًا وَقَلِيلٌ مِنْ عِبَادِيَ ٱلشَّكُورُ
examples.english: They made for him what he willed of elevated chambers, statues, bowls like reservoirs, and stationary kettles. [We said], "Work, O family of David, in gratitude." And few of My servants are grateful.

etymology.text: From جَفْن (jafn) + ـَة (-a), cognate to Hebrew גֶּפֶן (gefen, “vine”), Classical Syriac ܓܦܢܬܐ (gəp̄entā), ܓܦܬܐ (gəp̄ettā, “vine”).
